Proven ability to work cross-functionally in a global, matrixed environment Strategic mindset combined with hands-on execution skills across the full product lifecycle Passion for innovation, with a strong interest in AI and advanced analytics applied to energy systems Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, including customer-facing experience Ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear product strategies and business value More about us Join us and become part of a diverse, collaborative, and purpose-driven organization where your work has real-world impact, and your ideas help shape the energy systems of tomorrow.
descriptionByLocale.fr: The opportunity At Hitachi Energy, we're shaping the future of sustainable energy systems—and you can be at the heart of it. As Product Manager for Power Applications (EMS \/ ADMS \/ DERMS), you will own the vision, strategy, and evolution of the advanced power and network analysis applications that power our Network Control (NC) portfolio. This is a highly visible, global role where technical depth meets strategic influence, and where your ideas can directly transform how power systems are analysed and optimised in real time. You'll work across a sophisticated ecosystem of products including EMS, ADMS, DERMS and more ensuring that our power applications are aligned, scalable, and future-ready. A key focus of this role is identifying game‑changing opportunities to apply AI in power system analysis , redefining what's possible for grid operations worldwide. How you'll make an impact Define and drive the product vision, roadmap, and long-term strategy for power applications within the NC portfolio Lead the end-to-end product lifecycle, from requirements and design through testing, release, and post-launch support Shape and evolve advanced applications such as State Estimation, Power Flow (balanced & unbalanced), Security Analysis, Transient Stability, Dynamic Assessment, and Optimal Power Flow Collaborate with global R&D, Sales, Pre-sales, Marketing, and Customer Service teams to prioritize features and ensure successful delivery Identify and champion AI-driven innovations that revolutionize real-time power system analysis and optimization Monitor market trends and competitors to uncover differentiation and growth opportunities Define and track KPIs to measure product performance and customer value Support pricing strategies in partnership with Finance and assist Sales with technical expertise during pre- and post-sales engagements Engage directly with customers and partners, representing Hitachi Energy at industry conferences and events Your background Strong experience in product management, preferably within power systems, utilities, or complex software portfolios Deep understanding of power system analysis applications such as power flow, stability analysis, security analysis, and optimization Proven ability to work cross-functionally in a global, matrixed environment Strategic mindset combined with hands-on execution skills across the full product lifecycle Passion for innovation, with a strong interest in AI and advanced analytics applied to energy systems Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, including customer-facing experience Ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear product strategies and business value More about us Join us and become part of a diverse, collaborative, and purpose-driven organization where your work has real-world impact, and your ideas help shape the energy systems of tomorrow.

jobs.title: Technical Project Manager 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity We are looking for a Project Manager to strengthen our Team in our Business Unit Transformers, Ticino. In this role you are leading the execution of medium-size projects mainly related to LV & MV Transformers and Reactors and ensure that all related activities are performed in accordance with Hitachi Energy policy, quality standards, health & safety and environment requirements. Our flexible work practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow. Please submit your resume in English. How you'll make an impact Developing project schedules, and determining resource requirements Monitoring and reporting on the status of projects including cost, timing, and staffing Ensuring adherence to internal and external quality standards (e.g., International Standards Organization) Manage After-Sales projects by ensuring the fulfillment of customer needs Identifying\/resolving obstacles to completing project on time and to budget May include work managing multiple, interrelated projects (including business transformation projects) On some projects, the work may include integrating vendor tasks into the project plan and tracking and reviewing vendor deliverables Your background Electrical Engineering or mechanical Engineering Background 2-3 years proven experience in Project Management with focus on Transformers and Reactors Collaboration with diverse number of stakeholders Very good knowledge of English and Italian; any other languages are a plus Strong communicator, self-driven and open-minded Structured and organized person with the ability to work under time pressure Team-player able to build and motivate a project team More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Siamo alla ricerca di un Project Manager per rafforzare il nostro Team nel nostro Business Unit Transformers, Ticino. In questo ruolo si sta conducendo l'esecuzione di progetti di medie dimensioni principalmente relativi a trasformatori e reattori LV & MV e garantire che tutte le attività correlate siano svolte in conformità con la politica di Hitachi Energy, standard di qualità, requisiti di salute e sicurezza e ambiente. Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere. Invia il tuo curriculum in inglese. ## Mansioni - Sviluppare programmi di progetto e determinare i requisiti delle risorse - Monitoraggio e reporting sullo stato dei progetti tra cui costi, tempi e personale - Garantire l'aderenza agli standard di qualità interni ed esterni (ad esempio, International Standards Organization) - Gestire i progetti After-Sales assicurando il soddisfacimento delle esigenze del cliente - Identificare/risolvere ostacoli al completamento del progetto sul tempo e sul budget - maggio includono la gestione di progetti di trasformazione aziendale multipli e intercorrelati Su alcuni progetti, il lavoro può includere l'integrazione dei compiti del fornitore nel piano di progetto e il monitoraggio e la revisione dei fornitori consegnabili ## Requisiti - Ingegneria elettrica o ingegneria meccanica Background - 2-3 anni comprovata esperienza in Project Management con focus su Transformers e Reactors - Collaborazione con il diverso numero di stakeholder - Molto buona conoscenza dell'inglese e dell'italiano; qualsiasi altra lingua è un plus - Forte comunicatore, auto-driven e open-minded - Strutturato e organizzato a persona ## Contatto Invia il tuo curriculum in inglese.
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione We are looking for a Project Manager to strengthen our Team in our Business Unit Transformers, Ticino. In this role you are leading the execution of medium-size projects mainly related to LV & MV Transformers and Reactors and ensure that all related activities are performed in accordance with Hitachi Energy policy, quality standards, health & safety and environment requirements. Our flexible work practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow. Please submit your resume in English. ## Mansioni - Developing project schedules, and determining resource requirements - Monitoring and reporting on the status of projects including cost, timing, and staffing - Ensuring adherence to internal and external quality standards (e.g., International Standards Organization) - Manage After-Sales projects by ensuring the fulfillment of customer needs - Identifying/resolving obstacles to completing project on time and to budget - May include work managing multiple, interrelated projects (including business transformation projects) - On some projects, the work may include integrating vendor tasks into the project plan and tracking and reviewing vendor deliverables ## Requisiti - Electrical Engineering or mechanical Engineering Background - 2-3 years proven experience in Project Management with focus on Transformers and Reactors - Collaboration with diverse number of stakeholders - Very good knowledge of English and Italian; any other languages are a plus - Strong communicator, self-driven and open-minded - Structured and organized person with the ability to work under time pressure - Team-player able to build and motivate a project team ## Cosa offriamo - Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow. ## Contatto Please submit your resume in English.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Wir suchen einen Projektmanager, um unser Team in unserem Business Unit Transformers, Ticino, zu stärken. In dieser Rolle führen Sie die Durchführung von mittelständischen Projekten vor allem im Zusammenhang mit LV & MV Transformers und Reactors und stellen sicher, dass alle damit verbundenen Aktivitäten in Übereinstimmung mit Hitachi Energiepolitik, Qualitätsstandards, Gesundheit und Sicherheit und Umweltanforderungen durchgeführt werden. Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen dabei, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistungsfähigkeit zu optimieren und eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können. Bitte geben Sie Ihren Lebenslauf auf Englisch ein. Mansioni - Entwicklung von Projektplänen und Bestimmung von Ressourcenanforderungen - Überwachung und Berichterstattung über den Status von Projekten einschließlich Kosten, Zeit und Personal - Sicherstellung der Einhaltung interner und externer Qualitätsstandards (z.B. International Standards Organization) - Verwalten von After-Sales-Projekten durch die Sicherstellung der Erfüllung von Kundenbedürfnissen - Identifikation/Resolvieren von Hindernissen für das Projekt zur Zeit und zum Budget - Mai umfassen die Arbeit mit mehreren geschäftsbezogenen Projekten Bei einigen Projekten kann die Arbeit die Integration von Lieferantenaufgaben in den Projektplan und das Tracking und die Überprüfung von Lieferanten liefern. Requisiti - Elektrotechnik oder Maschinenbau Hintergrund - 2-3 Jahre bewährte Erfahrung im Projektmanagement mit Fokus auf Transformers und Reactors - Zusammenarbeit mit verschiedenen Interessengruppen - Sehr gute Kenntnisse in Englisch und Italienisch wachsen; alle anderen Sprachen sind ein Plus - Starker Kommunikationspartner, selbstfahrende und offen-gesinnte Mitarbeiter Â Contatto Bitte geben Sie Ihren Lebenslauf auf Englisch ein.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione Nous sommes à la recherche d'un gestionnaire de projet pour renforcer notre équipe dans notre unité de transformation, Tessin. Dans ce rôle, vous dirigez l'exécution de projets de taille moyenne principalement liés à LV & MV Transformateurs et Réacteurs et vous assurez que toutes les activités connexes sont réalisées conformément à la politique Hitachi Energy, aux normes de qualité, à la santé et à la sécurité et aux exigences environnementales. Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir. Veuillez soumettre votre curriculum vitae en anglais. ## Mansioni - Élaborer des calendriers de projets et déterminer les besoins en ressources - Suivi et établissement de rapports sur l'état d'avancement des projets, y compris les coûts, le calendrier et la dotation - Assurer le respect des normes de qualité internes et externes (p. ex., l'Organisation internationale de normalisation) - Gérer les projets après-vente en assurant la satisfaction des besoins des clients - Identifier et résoudre les obstacles à l'achèvement du projet dans les délais et le budget - Peut comprendre la gestion de projets multiples et interdépendants (y compris les projets de transformation des activités) - Sur certains projets, le travail peut inclure l'intégration des tâches des fournisseurs dans le plan du projet et le suivi et l'examen des produits livrables des fournisseurs ## Requisiti - Génie électrique ou génie mécanique Contexte - 2-3 ans d'expérience prouvée en gestion de projet avec l'accent sur les transformateurs et les réacteurs - Collaboration avec divers intervenants - Très bonne connaissance de l'anglais et de l'italien; toute autre langue est un plus - Communicateur fort, autonome et ouvert - Personne structurée et organisée ayant la capacité de travailler sous pression temporelle - Joueur d'équipe capable de construire et de motiver une équipe de projet ## Cosa offriamo - Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir. ## Contatto Veuillez soumettre votre CV en anglais.

jobs.title: System Engineer (SCADA/RTU) for Substation Automation 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity To strengthen our engineering team, we are looking for a System Engineer (SCADA\/RTU) to work on control and protection systems in the field of power grid substations. Openness, customer orientation, and innovation are key success factors in our working environment. You should be a team player who collaborates across different organizational levels in an intercultural environment. If you enjoy combining technical expertise with a strong customer focus, this is an opportunity for you! Early-career professionals are also welcome to apply. Welcome to our team! How you'll make an impact In this challenging position, you will design sub-station control systems (SCADA) for high- and medium-voltage switchgear in accordance with the latest technology standards such as IEC 61850, IEC 104, and other protocols You will integrate the systems, including the parameterization of the Ethernet-based communication structure Furthermore, you will implement project-specific functions and software applications, carry out tests, and coordinate interfaces Supporting on-site commissioning at facilities throughout Switzerland is also part of your role You will support the project manager in technical matters and coordinate both customers and in-ternal partners You will create operating manuals tailored to customer requirements Your background Bachelor's or master's degree in power engineering, electrical engineering, or an equivalent qualification Basic knowledge of control and protection systems, RTU systems, or process automation systems is an advantage You have basic knowledge of cybersecurity and network architecture Alongside strong communication skills and team spirit, you must demonstrate the ability to work independently and take responsibility Fluent German (spoken and written) is required. Good English skills are essential; additional languages such as French are an advantage More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

jobs.title: Assembler 80 - 100% (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Position In dieser spannenden Position als Assembler hast du die Chance, aktiv an der Montage von Hochspannungsdurchführungen mitzuwirken und dabei höchste Qualitätsstandards umzusetzen. Du arbeitest selbstständig nach technischen Unterlagen und trägst durch deine präzise und zuverlässige Arbeitsweise zur termingerechten Fertigung komplexer Baugruppen bei. Deine Erfahrung in der Maschinenmontage sowie dein Verantwortungsbewusstsein machen dich zu einem wichtigen Teil eines engagierten Teams. Nutz die Möglichkeit, in einem flexiblen Arbeitsumfeld deine Fähigkeiten weiterzuentwickeln und gemeinsam mit uns zu wachsen. Unsere lokale Produktgruppe Insulation & Components ist technischer Marktführer in der Auslegung und Herstellung von Transformatoren-Durchführungen. Zu den Kunden zählen namhafte, internationale Unternehmen der Elektroindustrie, die sich mit Stromerzeugung, Stromübertragung und Stromverteilung befassen. Unsere Hochspannungs-Durchführungen nehmen weltweit eine Spitzenposition ein. Das kannst du bewirken Durchführung der Montage von Hochspannungsdurchführungen gemäss den in den Qualitätssiche­rungsverfahren und Arbeitsanweisungen festgehaltenen Vorgaben und Zielsetzungen Arbeiten nach Arbeits­papieren wie Kundenaufträge, technischen Unterlagen, Checkliste und Arbeits­plan Melden von Fehlern, Unstimmigkeiten an direkten Vorgesetzten Termingerechte und wirtschaftliche Montage der Baugruppen und Schaltersysteme Einhaltung der festgehaltenen QS-Richtlinien Schwachstellen erkennen, richtig stellen und an Vorgesetzten melden Einhaltung des Ablaufes für Fehlerbehebung Das bringst du mit Abgeschlossene Berufslehre als Polymechaniker o.ä. Praktische und theoretische Erfahrung in der Maschinenmontage Gute Kenntnisse im Lesen von Zeichnungsunterlagen und Arbeitspapieren Verantwortungs- und qualitätsbewusste Persönlichkeit Flexibilität, Ausdauer sowie Zielstrebigkeit runden Ihr Profil ab Bereitschaft zu 3-Schichtbetrieb Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen dir, deine persönlichen und beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.

Praktische und theoretische Erfahrung in der Maschinenmontage Gute Kenntnisse im Lesen von Zeichnungsunterlagen und Arbeitspapieren Verantwortungs- und qualitätsbewusste Persönlichkeit Flexibilität, Ausdauer sowie Zielstrebigkeit runden Ihr Profil ab Bereitschaft zu 3-Schichtbetrieb Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen dir, deine persönlichen und beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Über die Position In dieser spannenden Position als Assembler hast du die Chance, aktiv an der Montage von Hochspannungsdurchführungen mitzuwirken und dabei höchste Qualitätsstandards umzusetzen. Du arbeitest selbstständig nach technischen Unterlagen und trägst durch deine präzise und zuverlässige Arbeitsweise zur termingerechten Fertigung komplexer Baugruppen bei. Deine Erfahrung in der Maschinenmontage sowie dein Verantwortungsbewusstsein machen dich zu einem wichtigen Teil eines engagierten Teams. Nutz die Möglichkeit, in einem flexiblen Arbeitsumfeld deine Fähigkeiten weiterzuentwickeln und gemeinsam mit uns zu wachsen. Unsere lokale Produktgruppe Insulation & Components ist technischer Marktführer in der Auslegung und Herstellung von Transformatoren-Durchführungen. Zu den Kunden zählen namhafte, internationale Unternehmen der Elektroindustrie, die sich mit Stromerzeugung, Stromübertragung und Stromverteilung befassen. Unsere Hochspannungs-Durchführungen nehmen weltweit eine Spitzenposition ein. Praktische und theoretische Erfahrung in der Maschinenmontage Gute Kenntnisse im Lesen von Zeichnungsunterlagen und Arbeitspapieren Verantwortungs- und qualitätsbewusste Persönlichkeit Flexibilität, Ausdauer sowie Zielstrebigkeit runden Ihr Profil ab Bereitschaft zu 3-Schichtbetrieb Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen dir, deine persönlichen und beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.

jobs.title: Global Product Specialist - Dry type transformers (mainstream)
jobs.description: The opportunity Hitachi Energy is looking for a Global Product Specialist for mainstream business of Dry-type transformers to join our innovative team in any of these locations: Raleigh\/USA, Bland\/USA, Savli\/India, Vadodara\/India, Cheonan\/South Korea, Zaragoza\/Spain, Shanghai\/China. In this role, you will play a key part in supporting the global product manager in managing the dry-type transformer product portfolio, conducting comprehensive market\/segment technical analysis, and supporting the development of cutting-edge products. This position not only provides a chance to expand your skills and knowledge in the energy industry but also offers the opportunity to contribute to transformative solutions that promote sustainability and advance your career in a rapidly evolving market. How you will make an impact Conduct comprehensive market\/segment technical analysis to identify trends and assess their impact on the transformer portfolio. Evaluate technical requirements and perform competitive assessments to pinpoint product gaps and improvement opportunities. Manage and update technical specifications for existing products to ensure market competitiveness and value. Oversee performance improvement initiatives through benchmarking and quality feedback on dry type transformers. Ensure compliance with international regulations and industry standards throughout the product lifecycle. Support new product development by translating market requirements into actionable inputs for the product roadmap and technical requirement specifications. Prepare and present technical communication materials to support product launches and enhance market positioning. Develop and deliver engaging training sessions to empower cross-functional teams with the latest product knowledge and market insights. Living Hitachi Energy's core values of safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business. Responsible to ensure compliance with applicable external and internal regulations, procedures, and guidelines. Your background Degree in Electrical\/Mechanical Engineering. Minimum of 7 years of experience in R&D, product\/technology development or engineering in dry type transformers, or a similar role within the transformers or energy industry. Strong technical understanding of dry type transformers, energy solutions and industry technologies to effectively communicate product benefits and differentiate offerings. Proven ability to conduct market analysis and competitive assessments to drive product developments. Excellent communication and presentation skills for both technical and non-technical audiences. Ability to work collaboratively across cross-functional teams and manage multiple projects simultaneously. Fluent English

jobs.title: Project Management Officer - Gas Insulated Switchgear 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity In this role, you will report to the Department Manager of Project Management and support a growing global team of more than 70 Project Managers globally. You will play a key role in strengthening project execution excellence for our Gas Insulated Switchgear (GIS) customer projects by shaping robust processes, governance, and continuous improvement initiatives across a diverse project portfolio. This position offers a unique opportunity to combine strategic process ownership, portfolio governance, and continuous improvement leadership in an international project environment. How you'll make an impact Develop, implement, and continuously improve project management processes, standards, and governance across a global project portfolio Strengthen process and portfolio competence to ensure transparency and on‑time delivery (OTD) of customer projects Translate lessons learned from project execution into structured continuous improvement (CI) actions Lead and support mid‑term strategic project management initiatives in close cross‑functional collaboration Act as an escalation point for systemic project management issues and drive sustainable resolutions Ensure project management methods, tools, and IT systems are fit for purpose and continuously optimized Leverage data analytics to support data‑driven decision‑making and identify improvement opportunities Actively contribute to and collaborate within the CI community, fostering a learning and improvement culture Your background 5+ years of experience in project management within complex, international project environments Strong expertise in project management processes, governance, and portfolio management Project Management Professional (PMP) certification Lean Six Sigma Green Belt or Black Belt with a strong continuous improvement mindset Experience in business analysis and applying Lean concepts in a technology-driven environment Proven leadership, stakeholder management, and communication skills Experience managing external partners and contract resources Active member of a CI community, with a collaborative and knowledge-sharing mindset More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

jobs.title: Quality Operator 80 - 100% (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Position In unserem Werk BiMOS Backend in Lenzburg stellen wir effiziente und hochwertige Leistungshalbleiter für den Einsatz in Motorensteuerungen und Wechselrichtersystemen her. Damit leisten wir einen entscheidenden Beitrag, die Industrie, den öffentlichen und individuellen Verkehr energieeffizienter zu gestalten und andererseits ermöglicht unsere Technologie das Produzieren und Transportieren von erneuerbaren Energien vom Produktionsstandort hin zum Verbraucher. Unsere hoch-integrierte Industrie 4.0-Standard-Fertigung bietet ein spannendes und herausforderndes Arbeitsumfeld für den nächsten Quality Operator. Werde Teil der Energiewende und unterstütze uns, in unserer hochautomatisierten Fabrik qualitativ hervorragende Produkte her zu stellen. Das kannst du bewirken Bearbeitung von Produktionslosen nach geltender Arbeitsanweisung unter Reinraumbedingungen Bedienen und Überwachen von automatisierten Fertigungsanlagen Sicherstellen durchgehender Fertigungsqualität mit Hilfe von In-Prozess-Kontrollen und Einnahme der Kundensicht Aus- und Weiterbildung der Operatoren in Zusammenarbeit mit dem Qualitätstechniker und den Senior Operators Sicherstellung der Einhaltung von Arbeitssicherheits-, Gesundheits- und Umweltschutzvorschriften sowie von Ordnung und Sauberkeit in der Produktion Dein Hintergrund Abgeschlossene Lehre (technischer Hintergrund von Vorteil) oder vergleichbare Ausbildung Produktionserfahrung, idealerweise im Reinraum Manuelles Geschick, Zuverlässigkeit Gute Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift, sowie EDV-Anwenderkenntnisse (Grundkenntnisse in MS Office) Abgeschlossene Ausbildung und erste Erfahrung in der Qualitätssicherung von Vorteil Bereitschaft zur eigenen kontinuierlichen Weiterentwicklung und Schulung, sowie bereitschaft für Arbeit im ununterbrochenen Betrieb (Wochenende, Spät- & Nachtschicht) Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen dir, deine persönlichen und beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.

Das kannst du bewirken Bearbeitung von Produktionslosen nach geltender Arbeitsanweisung unter Reinraumbedingungen Bedienen und Überwachen von automatisierten Fertigungsanlagen Sicherstellen durchgehender Fertigungsqualität mit Hilfe von In-Prozess-Kontrollen und Einnahme der Kundensicht Aus- und Weiterbildung der Operatoren in Zusammenarbeit mit dem Qualitätstechniker und den Senior Operators Sicherstellung der Einhaltung von Arbeitssicherheits-, Gesundheits- und Umweltschutzvorschriften sowie von Ordnung und Sauberkeit in der Produktion Dein Hintergrund Abgeschlossene Lehre (technischer Hintergrund von Vorteil) oder vergleichbare Ausbildung Produktionserfahrung, idealerweise im Reinraum Manuelles Geschick, Zuverlässigkeit Gute Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift, sowie EDV-Anwenderkenntnisse (Grundkenntnisse in MS Office) Abgeschlossene Ausbildung und erste Erfahrung in der Qualitätssicherung von Vorteil Bereitschaft zur eigenen kontinuierlichen Weiterentwicklung und Schulung, sowie bereitschaft für Arbeit im ununterbrochenen Betrieb (Wochenende, Spät- & Nachtschicht) Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen dir, deine persönlichen und beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Über die Position In unserem Werk BiMOS Backend in Lenzburg stellen wir effiziente und hochwertige Leistungshalbleiter für den Einsatz in Motorensteuerungen und Wechselrichtersystemen her. Damit leisten wir einen entscheidenden Beitrag, die Industrie, den öffentlichen und individuellen Verkehr energieeffizienter zu gestalten und andererseits ermöglicht unsere Technologie das Produzieren und Transportieren von erneuerbaren Energien vom Produktionsstandort hin zum Verbraucher. Unsere hoch-integrierte Industrie 4.0-Standard-Fertigung bietet ein spannendes und herausforderndes Arbeitsumfeld für den nächsten Quality Operator. Werde Teil der Energiewende und unterstütze uns, in unserer hochautomatisierten Fabrik qualitativ hervorragende Produkte her zu stellen. jobs.title: Project Manager GIS High Voltage 80 - 100%
jobs.description: The opportunity Do you want to have a global impact with your work? Do you enjoy leading an international project team, being strategic and doing project planning, risk analysis? Do you like to be hands-on too? We might have the perfect opportunity for you! We are in the High Voltage Product group within Hitachi Energy, a leading specialist for power distribution and transmission. In our unit, the Gas Insulated Switchgears (GIS) – based in Zürich-Oerlikon, development and production of different GIS products are managed globally. We ensure high reliability of our systems by using state-of-the-art development tools and methods. We are looking for someone to strengthen our GIS Project Manager team here in Zürich-Oerlikon. You will become part of a global team that operates from Switzerland, India and USA with very diverse backgrounds and experience as well. The position offers a lot of personal and professional development opportunities with flexible work possibilities – home office within Switzerland along with international customer exposure. You will represent Hitachi Energy towards our customers and manage GIS projects end to end. Does this sound exciting? Contact us! How you'll make an impact Lead complex projects, managing all phases from sales handover to project closure Build and maintain strong relationships with stakeholders, ensuring clear communication Serve as the primary contact for international customers, leading meetings and factory acceptance tests Identify, assess, and manage project risks while pursuing opportunities Monitor project progress, resources, and financials effectively Handle change, claim, and risk management, and report financials to the controlling team Contribute to process improvements and participate in strategic initiatives Your background Min. 5 years of experience as a Project Manager in an industrial environment Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, for effective stakeholder engagement Experience in leading customer meetings and presentations Strong understanding of risk management, financial reporting, and budget control Professional certifications are highly valuable Fluent in German or French, English is mandatory More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

jobs.title: Troubleshooting Process Quality Technician 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: Die Möglichkeit Der Bereich GIS (Gasisolierte Schaltanlagen) steht für höchste Qualität, Sicherheit und Effizienz – und genau hier setzt deine Rolle an. In dieser Rolle übernimmst du eine zentrale Funktion in der Bearbeitung und Koordination von Qualitätsmeldungen in der Produktion. Du erkennst Probleme frühzeitig, analysierst sie strukturiert und sorgst für nachhaltige Lösungen. Dabei arbeitest du eng mit verschiedenen internen Stakeholdern zusammen und trägst aktiv zur Weiterentwicklung unserer Prozesse bei. Das kannst du bewirken Du bist die erste Eskalationsstufe für die Produktion und arbeitest eng mit internen Stakeholdern zusammen. Verantwortlich für die Erstellung und Koordination von Qualitätsmeldungen (QN) in der Produktion Sicherstellung der Einhaltung von Qualitäts- und Sicherheitsstandards Priorisierung von Qualitätsmeldungen (Q-Meldungen) Enge Zusammenarbeit mit internen Abteilungen wie Produktion, Qualität, Engineering, Planung, Projektleitung und Einkauf Du untersützt die Weiterentwicklung von Troubleshooting Prozessen zur kontinuierlichen Verbesserung Unterstützung bei Audits und internen Reviews Das bringst du mit Technische Ausbildung im Bereich Elektrotechnik, Maschinenbau, Qualität Erfahrung im Troubleshooting, Produktionsprozesse oder in Qualitätsmanagement Analytisches Denken, strukturierte Arbeitsweise und hohe Problemlösungskompetenz Ausgeprägte Kommunikations- und Entscheidungsfähigkeit Verhandlungssichere Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse Kenntnisse in SAP und MES Detaillierte Produktkenntnisse im Bereich Gas Isolierte Schaltanlagen Mehr über uns Bei Hitachi Energy glauben wir an die Kraft der Vielfalt, Zusammenarbeit und Innovation. Unsere Kultur ist geprägt von kontinuierlichem Lernen und dem gemeinsamen Ziel, nachhaltige Energielösungen zu gestalten. Wir fördern ein inklusives Arbeitsumfeld, in dem jede Meinung zählt und du deine Ideen einbringen kannst – unabhängig von Herkunft, Geschlecht oder Hintergrund.

jobs.title: Vice President Sales & Marketing GPQSS
jobs.description: The opportunity Our Grid Integration – GPQSS (AC system integration business) is seeking a global Marketing and Sales Leader to shape, accelerate, and execute our worldwide commercial strategy. This senior strategic role requires an accomplished sales executive capable of driving profitable growth, strengthening our market presence, and leading high‑performing global teams within a complex matrix organization. As the Executive Sales & Marketing Manager, you will own the long‑term commercial strategy and its operational execution for the Global Product Group, setting the global sales vision and targets while ensuring effective deployment across countries and segments. You will be responsible for delivering ambitious growth, margin, and market‑expansion objectives in alignment with the Business Unit's Marketing & Sales strategy. As a key member of the global leadership team, you will collaborate closely with Product Management, Business Development, Operations, Finance, and regional leaders, and you will represent Hitachi Energy's Grid and Power Quality Solutions and Service business in senior customer engagements, industry forums, and strategic partnerships, positioning the organization as a trusted technology leader. How you'll make an impact Lead the development and execution of the global commercial strategy for the GPQSS business , establishing a clear long‑term vision while translating it into actionable, country‑level and segment‑specific sales plans that enable consistent, scalable growth worldwide. Define and own the global sales ambition , including revenue, margin, and market‑expansion targets, ensuring that sales objectives are not only aligned with the Business Unit's Marketing & Sales strategy but also underpinned by data‑driven insights, competitive positioning, and emerging customer trends. Drive profitable growth across all regions by orchestrating a unified go‑to‑market approach, strengthening pipeline quality, enhancing forecasting precision, and ensuring disciplined commercial performance management across a complex matrix structure. Elevate the global market presence of Hitachi Energy's Grid and Power Quality Solutions & Services , positioning the portfolio as the industry benchmark through targeted market intelligence, differentiated value propositions, and thought‑leadership activities that reinforce our reputation as a trusted technology leader. Lead, inspire, and develop high‑performing global sales and marketing teams , embedding a culture of accountability, collaboration, and commercial excellence while equipping teams with the tools, training, and structures they need to execute at scale. Act as a strategic partner to key internal stakeholders , including Product Management, Business Development, Operations, Finance, and regional leadership, ensuring tight alignment between commercial strategy, product roadmap priorities, delivery capabilities, and business performance objectives. Represent the business at the highest levels in customer and industry engagements , building and nurturing executive relationships, leading negotiations, and influencing industry bodies, strategic alliances, and ecosystem partners to advance Hitachi Energy's leadership in grid integration and power quality. Drive cross‑functional alignment to accelerate market penetration , ensuring seamless coordination between sales, marketing, tendering, service, and operations to maximize win rates, optimize pricing strategies, and enhance customer value across the lifecycle. Oversee commercial governance frameworks and performance metrics , ensuring that global sales activities are executed consistently, ethically, and efficiently, and that rigorous performance tracking supports continuous improvement and strategic agility. Champion innovation and market‑back insights , feeding customer, competitor, and market intelligence into the organization to shape future product strategies, guide investment decisions, and identify new growth oppor

This senior strategic role requires an accomplished sales executive capable of driving profitable growth, strengthening our market presence, and leading high‑performing global teams within a complex matrix organization. As the Executive Sales & Marketing Manager, you will own the long‑term commercial strategy and its operational execution for the Global Product Group, setting the global sales vision and targets while ensuring effective deployment across countries and segments. You will be responsible for delivering ambitious growth, margin, and market‑expansion objectives in alignment with the Business Unit's Marketing & Sales strategy. As a key member of the global leadership team, you will collaborate closely with Product Management, Business Development, Operations, Finance, and regional leaders, and you will represent Hitachi Energy's Grid and Power Quality Solutions and Service business in senior customer engagements, industry forums, and strategic partnerships, positioning the organization as a trusted technology leader. How you'll make an impact Lead the development and execution of the global commercial strategy for the GPQSS business , establishing a clear long‑term vision while translating it into actionable, country‑level and segment‑specific sales plans that enable consistent, scalable growth worldwide. Define and own the global sales ambition , including revenue, margin, and market‑expansion targets, ensuring that sales objectives are not only aligned with the Business Unit's Marketing & Sales strategy but also underpinned by data‑driven insights, competitive positioning, and emerging customer trends. Drive profitable growth across all regions by orchestrating a unified go‑to‑market approach, strengthening pipeline quality, enhancing forecasting precision, and ensuring disciplined commercial performance management across a complex matrix structure. Elevate the global market presence of Hitachi Energy's Grid and Power Quality Solutions & Services , positioning the portfolio as the industry benchmark through targeted market intelligence, differentiated value propositions, and thought‑leadership activities that reinforce our reputation as a trusted technology leader. Lead, inspire, and develop high‑performing global sales and marketing teams , embedding a culture of accountability, collaboration, and commercial excellence while equipping teams with the tools, training, and structures they need to execute at scale. Act as a strategic partner to key internal stakeholders , including Product Management, Business Development, Operations, Finance, and regional leadership, ensuring tight alignment between commercial strategy, product roadmap priorities, delivery capabilities, and business performance objectives. Represent the business at the highest levels in customer and industry engagements , building and nurturing executive relationships, leading negotiations, and influencing industry bodies, strategic alliances, and ecosystem partners to advance Hitachi Energy's leadership in grid integration and power quality. Drive cross‑functional alignment to accelerate market penetration , ensuring seamless coordination between sales, marketing, tendering, service, and operations to maximize win rates, optimize pricing strategies, and enhance customer value across the lifecycle. Oversee commercial governance frameworks and performance metrics , ensuring that global sales activities are executed consistently, ethically, and efficiently, and that rigorous performance tracking supports continuous improvement and strategic agility. Champion innovation and market‑back insights , feeding customer, competitor, and market intelligence into the organization to shape future product strategies, guide investment decisions, and identify new growth oppor

jobs.title: Field Service Technician Power Transformers (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Join our dynamic Transformers After Sales team in Zürich, Switzerland, and play a hands-on role in powering the nation! As a key player, you'll be at the forefront of maintaining and enhancing the reliability and longevity of power transformers all across Switzerland. In this role, you'll directly impact the stability of the Swiss electrical grid and get the unique opportunity to work alongside leading companies in the Swiss energy sector. Every day, you'll tackle new technical challenges, ensure the safe and high-quality execution of critical fieldwork, and proudly represent Hitachi Energy's reputation for technical excellence and customer satisfaction. Step into a position where your expertise truly makes a difference! How you´ll make an impact Apply and enforce Hitachi Energy safety standards during all onsite operations. Perform installations, preventive and corrective maintenance, inspections, and overhauls on power transformers in accordance with internal procedures. Plan, coordinate and optimize field interventions to ensure efficiency and quality. Identify potential service opportunities and communicate them to the Sales team. Collaborate closely with customers, project teams, suppliers and other stakeholders, ensuring clear and timely communication. Actively contribute to continuous improvement within the service organization. Complete all reports, documentation and quality records accurately in the internal tracking system. Your background Federal Certificate of Competence (CFC) in mechanics, industrial maintenance, electromechanics, or a related field (e.g., locksmith, mechanic, polymechanic, automation technician). At least 2 years of relevant field experience is considered an asset. Willingness to travel across Switzerland for extended periods (minimum 1 week) and occasionally work in 2×8 shifts. Strong sense of responsibility and high awareness of safety requirements. Valid Category B driver's licence. Good command of German, with English and French as additional working languages. What would be a plus Knowledge of electrical wiring and electrical diagrams Welding skills Motivation to follow internal training on transformer assembly and field interventions, including advanced training in Hitachi Energy factories More about us Exciting and varied responsibilities with plenty of room for autonomy and creativity Attractive opportunities for further training and personal development Interesting and diverse tasks and projects – including international assignments A well ‑ coordinated and dynamic team An open and supportive company culture An attractive compensation package including fixed salary, travel and meal allowances, as well as the opportunity to have a say in accommodation arrangements

jobs.title: R&D Transformer Service Operations domain expert (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity: For our Transformer Global Team we are looking for R&D Transformer Service Operations domain expert (f\/m\/d) In this role you will be responsible for supporting and leading Research and Development projects related to Transformer Service Operations. Your focus will be contribution towards operations around transformer service portfolio, best practices collection, standardization and coordination of improvements within Transformer Service HUBs and local units together with Technology Centers and Research teams. How will you make an impact: Run standardization projects, propose and develop new operational concepts around new services, and simulate their expected performance in real pilots. Organize prototyping and testing activities to validate new \/ existing transformer services. Making standard policies, instructions, training material to ensure the effective implementation of the targeted processes from operational, quality and knowledge transfer standpoint. Provide support to other team member as well as local units when needed (operations, engineering, product management, product marketing, ...) Participate in, and assist team members in a variety of more complex operations activities. Global collaboration with scientists of Hitachi Energy Research team and Technology Centers, Technology Managers and Engineers from the various GPGs (Service \/ PT \/ DT). Your background: MSc education within Electrical or Mechanical Engineering field. More than 10 years of proven experience within Power Transformers operations. Experience in transformer service portfolio within multinational environment will be highly valued. Ability to use effective methodologies around knowledge and experience capture. Ability to create technical and operational documentation, training instructions… Spirit of innovation, out of the box thinking. Excellent abilities in teamwork in international teams with excellent interpersonal skills. A high level of self-motivation. A collaborative, structured, problem-solving, self-driven, solutions-oriented approach and strong communication skills. Fluent spoken and written English. Other languages will be an advantage. More about us: Our employee benefit programs are tailored to each country, depending on location of employment and job grade. More specific information on the employee benefit program offering in your intended country of employment\/ more information will be available during the recruitment process.

jobs.title: ​​Lead Data Platform Architect​
jobs.description: The Opportunity Business Unit Service is at the forefront of delivering advanced digital and outcome ‑ based service solutions worldwide. Our Service R&D organization develops next ‑ generation digital, data ‑ driven, and OT ‑ integrated service solutions that enable long ‑ term asset performance, reliability, and operational excellence across the energy and industrial domain. As Lead Data Platform Architect, you will play a key role in defining and evolving the data platform foundation that underpins BU Service digital service solutions. You will ensure that data platforms spanning cloud services, IoT and OT data sources, analytics, and AI enablement are architected, governed, and operated to support scalable, secure, and high ‑ quality digital solutions. This role directly impacts the success of data ‑ driven services, advanced analytics, and AI ‑ powered use cases, where data quality, availability, and reliability are critical for business value and customer trust. How You'll Make an Impact Defining and owning the data platform strategy and architecture for digital service solutions, covering cloud ‑ native data platforms, data lakes\/ lakehouses , streaming and batch pipelines, and analytics services. Establishing architectural principles and standards aligned with modern cloud delivery models, industrial scalability, and long ‑ lifecycle service solutions. Governing data ingestion and integration patterns from cloud services, enterprise systems, IoT, OT devices, and edge software. Designing and maintaining data models, schemas, and integration patterns that ensure consistent, reusable, and high ‑ quality data across solutions. Establishing and operating data governance frameworks, including data quality, lineage, traceability, ownership, and lifecycle management. Ensuring compliance with cybersecurity, regulatory, and industrial data handling requirements. Enabling advanced analytics, AI\/ML, and digital twin use cases through appropriate data platform capabilities, pipelines, and analytics services. Guiding implementation of robust, scalable data pipelines and storage solutions in collaboration with development, platform, DevOps, AI, cybersecurity, and IT teams. Integrating data platform components into CI\/CD pipelines, supporting automated testing, deployment, and governance controls. Defining and monitoring key metrics related to data quality, platform reliability, usage, and business impact. Your Background University degree (Bachelor's or Master's) in Data Science, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field. Proven experience in designing, implementing, or governing cloud ‑ based data platforms in complex digital or industrial environments. Strong understanding of data modeling, data pipelines, and data lifecycle management. Experience with data ingestion from IoT, OT, and enterprise systems. Solid knowledge of data governance, data quality management, and traceability concepts. Experience working in agile, hybrid, or scaled development environments. Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate across global, cross ‑ functional teams What's in It for You A strategic leadership role where your work directly shapes the quality and reliability of next ‑ generation digital service solutions The opportunity to operate at enterprise scale, influencing standards, capabilities, and ways of working beyond individual projects A collaborative, technology ‑ driven environment with strong links to innovation, R&D, and service transformation Exposure to complex, real ‑ world digital challenges across cloud, edge, and industrial domains A role designed for experienced professionals who want to combine technical depth with organizational leadership and strategic impact More about us We pride ourselves on offering a holistic range of competitive benefits to support your financial, physical and mental wellbeing and personal development. We want you to truly thrive with us, in work and out. We can provide mo

Establishing architectural principles and standards aligned with modern cloud delivery models, industrial scalability, and long ‑ lifecycle service solutions. Governing data ingestion and integration patterns from cloud services, enterprise systems, IoT, OT devices, and edge software. Designing and maintaining data models, schemas, and integration patterns that ensure consistent, reusable, and high ‑ quality data across solutions. Establishing and operating data governance frameworks, including data quality, lineage, traceability, ownership, and lifecycle management. Ensuring compliance with cybersecurity, regulatory, and industrial data handling requirements. Enabling advanced analytics, AI\/ML, and digital twin use cases through appropriate data platform capabilities, pipelines, and analytics services. Guiding implementation of robust, scalable data pipelines and storage solutions in collaboration with development, platform, DevOps, AI, cybersecurity, and IT teams. Integrating data platform components into CI\/CD pipelines, supporting automated testing, deployment, and governance controls. Defining and monitoring key metrics related to data quality, platform reliability, usage, and business impact. Your Background University degree (Bachelor's or Master's) in Data Science, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field. Proven experience in designing, implementing, or governing cloud ‑ based data platforms in complex digital or industrial environments. Strong understanding of data modeling, data pipelines, and data lifecycle management. Experience with data ingestion from IoT, OT, and enterprise systems. Solid knowledge of data governance, data quality management, and traceability concepts. Experience working in agile, hybrid, or scaled development environments. Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate across global, cross ‑ functional teams What's in It for You A strategic leadership role where your work directly shapes the quality and reliability of next ‑ generation digital service solutions The opportunity to operate at enterprise scale, influencing standards, capabilities, and ways of working beyond individual projects A collaborative, technology ‑ driven environment with strong links to innovation, R&D, and service transformation Exposure to complex, real ‑ world digital challenges across cloud, edge, and industrial domains A role designed for experienced professionals who want to combine technical depth with organizational leadership and strategic impact More about us We pride ourselves on offering a holistic range of competitive benefits to support your financial, physical and mental wellbeing and personal development. jobs.title: Warehouse Specialist 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Position Du möchtest in einem dynamischen Umfeld arbeiten, Verantwortung übernehmen und aktiv zum reibungslosen Materialfluss beitragen? Dann bist du bei uns genau richtig. Als Warehouse Specialist spielst du eine entscheidende Rolle in unserem Logistikbereich und sorgst dafür, dass Material und Waren termingerecht, sicher und korrekt bewegt, gelagert und bereitgestellt werden. Mit deinem Engagement trägst du dazu bei, Ordnung, Effizienz und Qualität in unseren Lagerprozessen sicherzustellen. Das kannst du bewirken Administrative Tätigkeiten Erfassen und Pflegen von Daten im ERP-System Erstellen von Lieferscheinen, Versandpapieren und internen Dokumenten Bearbeitung von Bestellungen und Rückmeldungen Telefonische und schriftliche Korrespondenz mit internen Stellen und Lieferanten Unterstützung der Logistikleitung bei Auswertungen und Reportings Logistik & Lager Aktive Mitarbeit bei Prozessoptimierung und kontinuierlicher Verbesserung (KVP) Einlagerung der Ware nach vorgegebenen Prozessen Kommissionieren, Verpacken und Versandvorbereitung Be- und Entladen von LKW Durchführung von Inventuren Ordnung und Sauberkeit im Lager sicherstellen Das bringst du mit Abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Logistiker\/in EFZ oder mehrjährige Erfahrung in der Logistik Erfahrung mit administrativen Tätigkeiten von Vorteil Gute PC-Kenntnisse (MS Office, ERP-Systeme SAP \/S4 HANA) Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift, Englischkenntnisse von Vorteil Selbstständige, strukturierte und zuverlässige Arbeitsweise Körperlich belastbar und teamfähig Staplerausweis Mehr über uns Sicherer Arbeitsplatz in einem zukunftsorientierten Unternehmen Ein kollegiales Team mit kurzen Entscheidungswegen Attraktive Anstellungsbedingungen und Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten

jobs.title: Vorarbeiter/in Montage 80 - 100% (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Position Als Vorarbeiter in der GI Valves Fabrik in Turgi bzw. Seon übernimmst Du eine zentrale Rolle in der täglichen Produktionssteuerung. Du koordinierst operative Tätigkeiten innerhalb des Teams und sorgst dafür, dass Montage-, Prüf- und Logistikprozesse effizient, sicher und qualitätsgerecht ablaufen. Dabei bist Du die direkte Ansprechperson für die Mitarbeiter und arbeitest eng mit der Produktionsleitung und anderen Schnittstellen zusammen. Dein Einsatz trägt wesentlich dazu bei, dass wir unsere Produktionsziele erreichen und uns kontinuierlich verbessern. Neben koordinativen Tätigkeiten arbeitest Du aktiv im Montageprozess mit. Das kannst du bewirken Organisation und Überwachung der Produktionsabläufe (Montage, Prüfung, Logistik) Unterstützung des Teams sowohl fachlich als auch operativ Einhaltung von Sicherheits-, Qualitäts- und Umweltvorgaben Unterstützung bei der Einarbeitung neuer Mitarbeitender und Durchführung von Sicherheitsunterweisungen Zusammenarbeit mit Schnittstellen wie Planung, Qualität und Logistik sowie Dokumentation der Produktionsleistung Das bringst du mit Technische Berufsausbildung (z. B. Elektrotechnik, Elektroinstallation, Mechatronik) Mehrjährige Erfahrung in der Montage elektrotechnischer Komponenten Erfahrung als Vorarbeiter und gute Kommunikationsfähigkeiten Deutsch in Wort und Schrift, Englischkenntnisse von Vorteil SAP-Kenntnisse und Erfahrung mit digitalen Produktionssystemen sind ein Plus Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen dir, deine persönlichen und beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.

Dabei bist Du die direkte Ansprechperson für die Mitarbeiter und arbeitest eng mit der Produktionsleitung und anderen Schnittstellen zusammen. Dein Einsatz trägt wesentlich dazu bei, dass wir unsere Produktionsziele erreichen und uns kontinuierlich verbessern. Neben koordinativen Tätigkeiten arbeitest Du aktiv im Montageprozess mit. Das kannst du bewirken Organisation und Überwachung der Produktionsabläufe (Montage, Prüfung, Logistik) Unterstützung des Teams sowohl fachlich als auch operativ Einhaltung von Sicherheits-, Qualitäts- und Umweltvorgaben Unterstützung bei der Einarbeitung neuer Mitarbeitender und Durchführung von Sicherheitsunterweisungen Zusammenarbeit mit Schnittstellen wie Planung, Qualität und Logistik sowie Dokumentation der Produktionsleistung Das bringst du mit Technische Berufsausbildung (z. B. Elektrotechnik, Elektroinstallation, Mechatronik) Mehrjährige Erfahrung in der Montage elektrotechnischer Komponenten Erfahrung als Vorarbeiter und gute Kommunikationsfähigkeiten Deutsch in Wort und Schrift, Englischkenntnisse von Vorteil SAP-Kenntnisse und Erfahrung mit digitalen Produktionssystemen sind ein Plus Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen dir, deine persönlichen und beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.

jobs.title: Product Engineer – Power Semiconductors Packaging (BiMOS) 80 – 100% (m/f/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity As a Product Engineer, you will be a core member of the BiMOS Product Engineering Team, playing a key role at the interface of manufacturing, R&D, and quality. Based in Lenzburg, Switzerland, you will take end-to-end ownership of a product platform and drive its optimization using advanced data analysis and continuous improvement methods. Your work will directly impact product quality, yield, and cost competitiveness in high power semiconductor manufacturing. How you will make an impact Monitor, analyze, and interpret yield and quality data to identify improvement opportunities and drive sustainable enhancements in cost, quality, and yield Lead and execute improvement projects using methodologies such as Six Sigma, Lean Manufacturing, 8D, and related frameworks Take full product ownership after R&D handover, including coordination and monitoring of new product ramp up in the fabrication line Perform root cause analysis and troubleshooting of product defects, weaknesses, and quality issues, deriving clear conclusions on process and design gaps Maintain, enhance, and implement data acquisition, analytics, and reporting methods to support data driven decision making Support process and R&D engineers with strong technical expertise and structured problem-solving approaches Your background Master's degree or PhD in Physics, Electrical Engineering, or a related discipline Strong expertise in statistical analysis, problem solving methodologies, and advanced data analysis techniques Semiconductor manufacturing experience is an advantage Proven experience leading complex improvement projects, ideally with small, cross functional teams Comfortable working in an international, matrix organization, with excellent communication and collaboration skills Innovative, quality driven team player with a high willingness to learn and take ownership Very good command of German and English (written and spoken, B2\/C1 level) More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

jobs.title: High Voltage Testing and Process Engineer for Bushings 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity We are looking for a skilled and driven R&D Test and Process Engineer for Bushings with a specialized focus on high voltage (HV) testing and manufacturing process development . This role is critical in ensuring the performance, safety, and compliance of high voltage energy systems through rigorous testing, data analysis, and continuous process optimization. You will play a key role in bridging R&D and manufacturing, supporting the development of innovative energy technologies. How you'll make an impact Lead and execute high voltage testing activities in compliance with IEC, IEEE, and internal standards Design and implement test setups, selecting appropriate HV equipment and methodologies Analyze test data, document results, and support root cause investigations and corrective actions Collaborate with R&D and manufacturing teams to define test strategies and process requirements Drive continuous improvement in testing and prototyping processes to enhance efficiency and quality Ensure proper maintenance, calibration, and safe operation of HV test equipment Support prototyping activities and assess process feasibility in a manufacturing environment Promote a strong safety culture and ensure adherence to ISO 9001, ISO 45001, and company policies Your background Bachelor's or Master's degree in Electrical Engineering Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience in high voltage testing. Process engineering experience is a plus. Strong knowledge of HV testing protocols, equipment, and safety practices Familiarity with IEC, IEEE, ISO 9001, and ISO 45001 standards Proficient in analyzing test data and conducting failure analyses Fluent in German and good English knowledge, with excellent communication and problem-solving skills About Us Hitachi Energy offers you interesting tasks in a highly motivated team and an open communication style. Through an individual and practice-oriented induction plan, we will support you to quickly gain professional confidence to be able to work independently with high level of personal responsibility.

jobs.title: Commissioning Engineer 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Hitachi Energy High Voltage Service supports customers worldwide with after-sales services for generator circuit breakers and gas-insulated switchgear (GIS). The team works closely with customers globally on installation, commissioning, maintenance, retrofitting and modernization. In this role, you will be closely involved with the product and work on construction sites around the world. You will take on responsibility, contribute your own ideas and gain valuable international experience through extended assignments abroad. Continuous learning, teamwork and professional development are an integral part of your daily work. How you'll make an impact Commission and test GIS systems in close cooperation with customer representatives Verify correct system functionality according to specifications and scope of supply Identify deviations and initiate corrective actions with project stakeholders Ensure compliance with site safety regulations and procedures at all times Apply and monitor environmental protection measures on site Participate in site meetings with relevant stakeholders Your background Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Mechanics, or a related field Initial experience in commissioning and\/or control system engineering Fluent German and English communication skills Ability to work independently under challenging site conditions Willingness to travel globally up to 90% of working time More about us We are a technology-driven company with a strong focus on innovation, continuous improvement, and sustainable manufacturing. We offer flexible working conditions, dedicated mentorship, and a supportive, inclusive environment where you can grow personally and professionally – empowering you to thrive while balancing life and work.

jobs.title: Quality Specialist 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity As a Quality Specialist in Production, you are responsible for ensuring product and process quality, as well as continuously improving our manufacturing operations. You will collaborate closely with Engineering, Production, and Supply Chain to ensure compliance with internal and external quality requirements. How you'll make an impact Create and maintain quality and inspection plans Support new products and production lines, including quality and reliability assessments Participate in PFMEA, DFMEA, and process development activities Monitor critical process parameters and ensure compliance with quality standards Lead NCR management and analyze deviations using methods such as Pareto, 8D, Ishikawa, or 5‑Why Maintain quality‑relevant documentation and support internal\/external audits (incl. customer and ISO) Support the digitalization and automation of the production lines Collaborate with Production, Engineering, Supply Chain, CI, and lead or support quality-related projects and outgoing inspections Your background Technical education or university degree in Quality Management, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science, Production Technology, or a similar field Several years of experience in a production environment, ideally in quality assurance and preferably in a ceramic or silicon molding industry Strong knowledge of quality methods (8D, FMEA, RCA, Control Plans) Experience in auditing and in preparing quality reports Excellent analytical skills and a structured way of working Strong communication skills and a collaborative, solution‑oriented mindset Fluent in German and English, written and spoken Ability to work effectively with cross‑functional teams and stakeholders More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

jobs.title: Process Engineer BiMOS Backend 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity As a global leader in power semiconductor technology, we offer one of the most diverse product portfolios in the industry. Our products include thyristors, diodes, gate turn-off thyristors, integrated gate-commutated thyristors, insulated-gate bipolar transistors, and metal–oxide–semiconductor field-effect transistors. These components are trusted across sectors such as power transmission and distribution, mobility, and renewable energy for their exceptional quality and reliability. In the role of Process Engineer for BiMOS Backend, you will contribute to the advancement of our automated semiconductor production. You'll have the opportunity to improve existing manufacturing processes and lead innovative development projects, with a particular focus on automation and metal joining technologies. How you'll make an impact Improve the capability and quality of bonding and welding processes, by applying data analysis tools and designed experiments Analyze production data to optimize performance, identify long-term trends, and prevent potential failures Work on new automated production systems, improving production capacity and quality Support troubleshooting and root cause analysis to maintain and improve production throughput Collaborate to new product development by shaping the production process landscape and enabling volume manufacturing Your background A master's degree in industrial, mechanical, electrical, or chemical engineering, or a related field Several years of experience in an automated production environment, ideally within the semiconductor industry Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, a quality-focused mindset, and a proactive, hands-on approach Familiarity with DoE, data analysis, Six Sigma methodologies, and production statistics is a plus Proficiency in both German and English More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it: The opportunity As a global leader in power semiconductor technology, we offer one of the most diverse product portfolios in the industry. Our products include thyristors, diodes, gate turn-off thyristors, integrated gate-commutated thyristors, insulated-gate bipolar transistors, and metal–oxide–semiconductor field-effect transistors. These components are trusted across sectors such as power transmission and distribution, mobility, and renewable energy for their exceptional quality and reliability. In the role of Process Engineer for BiMOS Backend, you will contribute to the advancement of our automated semiconductor production. You'll have the opportunity to improve existing manufacturing processes and lead innovative development projects, with a particular focus on automation and metal joining technologies. How you'll make an impact Improve the capability and quality of bonding and welding processes, by applying data analysis tools and designed experiments Analyze production data to optimize performance, identify long-term trends, and prevent potential failures Work on new automated production systems, improving production capacity and quality Support troubleshooting and root cause analysis to maintain and improve production throughput Collaborate to new product development by shaping the production process landscape and enabling volume manufacturing Your background A master's degree in industrial, mechanical, electrical, or chemical engineering, or a related field Several years of experience in an automated production environment, ideally within the semiconductor industry Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, a quality-focused mindset, and a proactive, hands-on approach Familiarity with DoE, data analysis, Six Sigma methodologies, and production statistics is a plus Proficiency in both German and English More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

jobs.title: Mechaniker 80 - 100% (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Postion In dieser vielseitigen Position als Mechaniker tragen Sie maßgeblich zur Sicherstellung eines reibungslosen Produktionsbetriebs bei. Sie übernehmen anspruchsvolle Instandhaltungs- und Reparaturarbeiten an modernen Maschinen und Anlagen und wirken aktiv an technischen Optimierungen sowie Projekten mit. Ihre Fachkenntnisse in Mechanik, Automation und Steuerungstechnik ermöglichen es Ihnen, Störungen effizient zu analysieren und nachhaltige Lösungen umzusetzen. Dabei arbeiten Sie eng mit verschiedenen Schnittstellen zusammen und leisten einen wichtigen Beitrag zur kontinuierlichen Weiterentwicklung unserer technischen Infrastruktur. Unsere lokale Produktgruppe Insulation & Components ist technischer Marktführer in der Auslegung und Herstellung von Transformatoren-Durchführungen. Zu den Kunden zählen namhafte, internationale Unternehmen der Elektroindustrie, die sich mit Stromerzeugung, Stromübertragung und Stromverteilung befassen. Unsere Hochspannungs-Durchführungen nehmen weltweit eine Spitzenposition ein. Das können Sie bewirken Mechanische Instandsetzungsarbeiten an Maschinen und Anlagen durchführen Wartungs- und Revisionsarbeiten an Maschinen und Anlagen vornehmen Störungssuche- und analyse, sowie Behebung an Produktionsanlage Anpassungen und Umbauten an Produktions- und Infrastrukturanlagen Mitarbeit bei grossen Projekten in Zusammenarbeit mit verschiedenen Schnittstellen Erstellen von Wartungsunterlagen und Pflege Ersatzteilmanagement Das bringen Sie mit Grundausbildung als Mechaniker im Bereich Mechatronik, Maschinen- und Anlagenbau oder Werkzeugbau Berufserfahrung in der Instandhaltung \/ Instandsetzung von Maschinen und Anlagen Kenntnisse im Bereich Automation \/ Steuerungstechnik \/ Antriebstechnik Deutsch (gute Kenntnisse) Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmodelle helfen Ihnen, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistung zu optimieren und gleichzeitig ein Umfeld zu schaffen, in dem alle Mitarbeitenden befähigt sind und sich entfalten können.

jobs.title: Produktionsmitarbeiter/in 80 - 100% (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Die Möglichkeit Werde Teil eines engagierten Teams und übernimm Verantwortung beim Einrichten und Bedienen eines vielseitigen und anspruchsvollen Maschinenparks. Du sorgst für reibungslose Abläufe in der Fertigung, steuerst Aufträge eigenständig, führst Qualitätsprüfungen durch und stellst die Einsatzbereitschaft der Maschinen sicher. Mit technischem Know-how, Eigeninitiative und Teamgeist trägst Du aktiv zur Effizienz und Weiterentwicklung unserer Produktionsprozesse bei. Unsere Fabrik in Klingnau steht unseren Kunden als Kompetenzzentrum für die hochpräzise Kunststoffverarbeitung auf Weltniveau zur Verfügung. Der Standort lebt von einem flexiblen und motivierten Team mit einer flachen Hierarchie und kurzen Entscheidungswegen. Durch den stetigen Ausbau unserer Kompetenzen im Bereich der Kunststoffverarbeitung als auch durch die ständige Verbesserung unserer Geschäftsprozesse offerieren wir unseren Kunden innovative, zuverlässige, individuelle und sichere Lösungen für Ihre Anliegen in den Segmenten Stromerzeugung\/-verteilung, Railway, Raumfahrt, Service und Industrie. Diesen stellen wir Ihnen zu angemessenen Preisen, termingerecht in der gewünschten Qualität zur Verfügung. Wir sichern unsere Wettbewerbsfähigkeit durch Automatisierung und Optimierung unserer Fertigungslinien, um damit noch schneller und flexibler auf weltweite Markt und Kundenanforderungen eingehen zu können. Das kannst Du bewirken Maschinenbedienung: Selbstständiges Einrichten und Bedienen eines komplexen konventionellen Maschinenparks (u. a. Mehrspindelportalfräsmaschinen, Zylinderschleifmaschinen, Mehrblattsägen, Fräs- sowie Kehlmaschinen) Prüfanlagen & Zuschnitt: Eigenständiges Einrichten und Bedienen elektrischer Prüfanlagen sowie verschiedener Besäumanlagen Steuerung von Aufträgen: Du koordinierst und steuerst Fertigungsaufträge eigenverantwortlich und stellst eine termingerechte Abarbeitung sicher Qualitätsprüfung: Du führst regelmäßige Qualitätsprüfungen an bearbeiteten Bauteilen durch – von Einzelteilen bis hin zu Kleinserien Wartung und Instandhaltung: Du übernimmst die Wartung und den Unterhalt der eingesetzten Maschinen und sorgst für deren zuverlässige Einsatzbereitschaft Überwachung von Hilfsmitteln: Du behältst den Einsatz von Fertigungshilfsmitteln im Blick und stellst deren Verfügbarkeit und Funktionalität sicher Transport & Logistik: Du bedienst verschiedene Flurförderfahrzeuge und unterstützt so einen reibungslosen Materialfluss in der Produktion Das bringst Du mit Abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Polymechaniker, Industriemechaniker, Formenbauer, Schreiner oder in einem ähnlichen Beruf mit mehrjähriger Erfahrung in einer vergleichbaren Position Gute Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift, Englischkenntnisse von Vorteil Du bist teamfähig, arbeitest selbstständig und bringst ein hohes Maß an Verantwortungsbewusstsein mit Du besitzt ein ausgezeichnetes Verständnis für technische Zeichnungen und Stücklisten Du bist flexibel, zeigst Eigeninitiative und bringst eine hohe Leistungsbereitschaft mit Unternehmerisches Denken und eine ausgeprägte Kundenorientierung zeichnen dich aus Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen Dir, Deine beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.
